initiatives.name: Inland Empire Harm Reduction
initiatives.description: A grassroots harm reduction organization fostering mutual aid and community care through direct support in the Inland Empire region. They coordinate harm reduction supplies distribution, overdose prevention education, and solidarity networks while building power through peer support, direct action, and creating spaces for compassionate care and dignity.

initiatives.name: Inland Coalition for Immigrant Justice
initiatives.description: Provides support to coaltion of orgs that defend immigrant communities against deportation.

initiatives.name: Inland Empire Immigrant Youth Collective
initiatives.description: Founded in 2010, the Inland Empire Immigrant Youth Collective creates a safe space for immigrant youth to express themselves and achieve their full potential and their identity that intersects with being undocumented.

initiatives.name: Brittle Bush Distro
initiatives.description: Anarchist zine distro based in the Inland (Against) Empire in so-called CA. A couple of dorks with a copy machine.
